2299090.name: Helvetii Soundtrack
2299090.description: Scarlet Moon Records is pleased to present the Helvetii (Original Game Soundtrack) featuring music by Dale North and vocals by Emi Evans. The score is at times dark and ominous, and at others, beautiful and serene. North--best known for past works including RWBY: Arrowfell, Wizard of Legend, Dreamscaper, and Nintendo Minute--infuses electronic elements into a lush orchestral score, prominently featuring vocalist Emi Evans, who's best known for her work on NieR, Dark Souls, Ace Combat, and Star Wars: Visions. Specifically, Evans prepared lyrics in Gaulish.
